statusDetails.message:
AssertionError: Expected results but query failed: Query execution failed: {code: Neo.ClientError.Statement.SyntaxError} {message: Invalid statement syntax: cypher:  --> 2:1
  |
2 | MERGE (p:Person {login: prop.login})
  | ^---
  |
  = expected query_mid_clause or query_action}
Cypher: UNWIND $props AS prop
MERGE (p:Person {login: prop.login})
SET p.name = prop.name
RETURN p.name, p.login
